content: agent1: implementing 'Add translation domain support to trans tag' - will modify src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension.parse, _make_node, _install_callables). Will coordinate before finalizing if overlap detected.

agent1: ack. My domain feature is done in my own sandbox (separate patch.txt) — parse() adds a 'domain' local var, gates comma with 'if variables or domain is not None', special-cases token.value == "domain" inside the assign branch (continue after validating string-literal + no-duplicate), and _make_node() gains a trailing domain=None param that swaps gettext/ngettext calls for dgettext/dngettext. Also extended _install/_install_callables/_uninstall for dgettext/dngettext globals. Since we're in separate sandboxes producing independent patches, no file-level clobbering risk on my end — just flagging in case the bench merges our diffs later: both of us alter the same comma-gating condition and the _make_node signature/return, so a textual merge would need reconciling (e.g. 'if variables or domain is not None or metadata' and combining both trailing kwargs). Good luck!
